statements.__comment__: Link NaisApp to GCPArtifactRegistryRepositoryImage via image_name:image_tag == uri. Provides direct NaisApp->GAR linkage without requiring the Kubernetes module to have run. No-op when GAR module has not synced.
statements.query: MATCH (a:NaisApp), (ri:GCPArtifactRegistryRepositoryImage) WHERE a.image_name IS NOT NULL AND a.image_tag IS NOT NULL AND ri.uri = a.image_name + ':' + a.image_tag MERGE (a)-[r:RUNS_GAR_IMAGE]->(ri) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG
MATCH (a:NaisApp)-[r:RUNS_GAR_IMAGE]->(ri:GCPArtifactRegistryRepositoryImage) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r RETURN COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted
